title: Task
description: A typed task artifact for the drone-rl-lab experiment queue.

title.description: Human-readable title, e.g. 'exp_066 -- Asymmetric Critic + Entropy Annealing'

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the task

claimed_by.description: Agent ID that claimed this task, or null

hypothesis.description: What this experiment tests and why

expected_outcome.description: What a positive result would look like

scope_note.description: Limits on what this experiment proves

config.description: Path to YAML config file, e.g. configs/exp_066_asym_entropy_annealing.yaml

depends_on.description: Task ID or title this task depends on

priority.description: Lower number = higher priority. 0 is highest.

result_summary.description: One-line outcome after completion, e.g. 'MIXED -- 2/15 det gates'

result_path.description: Path to results directory, e.g. results/exp_066_asym_entropy_annealing/
